title: The Beginning and the End
overview: Flum Apricot's journey gets off to a horrible start as she goes from hero to zero.

title: Coincidence and Fate
overview: Flum heads off in search of the werewolf from the job request, but she encounters more than she bargained for.

title: Purity and Corruption
overview: Flum helps out a troubled man and finds herself with an unexpected job request.

title: Darkness and Light
overview: Flum and Sara, on the run from the beast, stumble upon a shady underground ruin.

title: Cruelty and Camaraderie
overview: What do Flum and Sara find when they return from the caves?

title: An Ordinary Life
overview: Now back in the capital, Flum starts to get used to her new living circumstances.

title: Meetings and Partings
overview: Flum finds herself in trouble up against Dein's gang and the corrupt guard.

title: Budding and Withering
overview: The gang try to learn more about the blind girl with amnesia they suddenly find themselves with.

title: Solitude and Family
overview: Ed, Johnny, Maria, and Sara grew up together like family, and they consider themselves siblings.

title: Truth and Reality
overview: Flum learns that several of her friends have disappeared and blames herself for getting them in trouble.

title: Dein and Flum
overview: Flum struggles to come to terms with the state she saw Ink in, and Dein shows up to complicate matters.

title: The End and the Beginning
overview: With Dein taken care of, Flum moves on to saving Milkit.
